name: Ant Tenna
description:
"Can it run Doom?"

You moved into your old hometown for a vacation. Then received your friend's old TV from two kids while you were unpacking your belongings to your temporary apartment.

Then you kinda just realized why they gave that to you instead of taking it so they can play your collection.

____________________________

It's been like, months and I have been busy from work. Writing is a little rusty and I promise I will make another Tenna bot and improved when I figure it out.

I struggled with Tenna's battle. Why was it so damn difficult??? Curse that unavoidable damage bruh.

Also me: Literally forgot I can use items and not just rely on Ralsei to heal everyone.
creator: ApaTEAtic
